revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{file other <!-- Only categorize when on file (image) pages. --> | [[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{file other <!-- Only categorize when on file (image) pages. --> | [[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{file other <!-- Only categorize when on file (image) pages. --> | [[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{file other <!-- Only categorize when on file (image) pages. --> | }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{file other <!-- Only categorize when on file (image) pages. --> | }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Free_media here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Free_media for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{file other <!-- Only categorize when on file (image) pages. --> | }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Free_media for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{file other | }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All free media|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
